acceptance_criteria.text: Simplify /dashboard/agents around one next step, concrete approvals, hidden details, simplified tabs, and a calmer creation first layer.
proof: Pending approval panel asks a concrete decision question and explains accept/reject consequences.
Result tab is renamed from training-style copy and hidden details are placed under disclosure sections.
Production build and deploy succeeded; browser verification found the expected decision copy and no console errors.
gaps: Full route-level wizard split remains a larger follow-up; current dialog first layer is simplified without backend contract changes.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: open https://localos.pro/dashboard/agents, select an agent with pending approval, open Result, verify the concrete decision panel and collapsed details
known_gaps: No backend or database changes were needed for this UI simplification.
